THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT SIENA PACIFIC, INC./MICHAEL AUSTIN RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT DE ANZA TILE CO. INC. $983.79 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,015.79, EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS INCLUDING COSTS ON APPEAL; UPON SATISFACTION OF THIS JUDGMENT, SIENA WILL BE ENTITLED TO TAKE POSSESSION OF THE STONE TECH IMPREGNATOR PRO AND THE SHOWER-CEILING TILES REFERENCED IN THIS JUDGMENT. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Continued To Oct-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey D. Wohl, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record
9:29am
Judge Wohl addresses the parties re a possible conflict of interest before hearings begin. After speaking to parties Judge Wohl determines there is not a conflict due to the fact that the name of the respondent was not the same as a party he thought he knew. The parties then sign the stip and order to allow Judge Wohl to hear the case.
10:17am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, De Anza Tile Co., Inc., appearing in Pro Per through Rich Papapietra; Appellant, Siena Pacific, Inc., appearing in Pro Per through Michael Austin. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Judge Wohl has questions for the parties.
11:37am
Matter is submitted, briefs were submitted by parties but not identified or marked as evidence. (Judge Wohl take the file and will return it to Alisa Hollander.)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2006 Continued

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-11-2006 Dismissal

RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Aug-02-2006 Set For Trial On Aug-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-17-2006 Continued
